# Amirlan Kalmukhan

> Official machine-readable profile for Amirlan Kalmukhan, also known as Amirlan, @amirlankalm, and @amirlannk.

## Summary

Amirlan Kalmukhan is a founding engineer at Speko (YC S26), building voice-AI infrastructure, low-latency agentic conversations, retrieval systems, and self-healing voice agents. He is based in Astana, Kazakhstan.

## Canonical identity

- Name: Amirlan Kalmukhan
- Short name: Amirlan
- Handles: @amirlankalm, @amirlannk
- Website: https://amirlan.dev
- Email: amirlan@speko.ai
- Location: Astana, Kazakhstan
- Current role: Founding Engineer at Speko
- Organization: Speko, https://speko.ai
- Accelerator: Y Combinator S26

## Topics

- Voice AI
- Voice agents
- Retrieval systems
- LLM infrastructure
- Latency optimization
- Agentic systems
- Self-healing agents
